title: phaseolus vulgaris var. sarcopardus
intro: Phaseolus vulgaris var. sarcopardus, also known as the "bird's foot bean" or "Mexican kidney bean," is a type of mung bean that belongs to the legume family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and lower cholesterol levels. The health benefits of Phaseolus vulgaris var. sarcopardus include its potential to aid in weight loss, improve blood sugar control, and boost cardiovascular health. This plant can be used to make various herbal preparations, such as teas, soups, and infusions, which can be consumed for its medicinal and nutritional benefits.
